General.Name: China Qinfa Group Ltd
General.Description: China Qinfa Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the mining, purchase and sale, filtering, storage, and blending of coal in the People's Republic of China and Indonesia. It is involved in goods transportation and logistics, and charter hire activities; sale of machine and machine materials; and machine repairing, as well as shipping transportation business. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. China Qinfa Group Limited operates as a subsidiary of Fortune Pearl International Limited.
General.Address: Central Plaza, Wan Chai, Hong Kong

4.Name: Mr. Jinyuan  Qi
4.Title: VP & Chairman of Coal Mine Division
